Connect to your Twenty CRM instance.\n\n:
Connect to your Twenty CRM instance.

1. Log in to your Twenty workspace.
2. Go to **Settings** → **APIs & Webhooks**.
3. Click **+ Create API key**, give it a name (e.g. "Activepieces"), and copy the generated key.
Creates a new person record in your Twen: Creates a new person record in your Twenty CRM workspace.
Creates a new company record in Twenty C: Creates a new company record in Twenty CRM.
Creates a new opportunity (deal) in Twen: Creates a new opportunity (deal) in Twenty CRM.
Searches for person records in Twenty CR: Searches for person records in Twenty CRM.
Searches for company records in Twenty C: Searches for company records in Twenty CRM.
Updates an existing person record in Twe: Updates an existing person record in Twenty CRM.
Updates an existing company record in Tw: Updates an existing company record in Twenty CRM.
